info.dc:title: singine-mail
info.dc:creator: Sina K. Heshmati
info.dc:subject: SMTP send, IMAP4 search, fetch, forward, git snapshot
info.dc:description: singine mail — governed SMTP send and IMAP4 search/fetch/forward opcode
info.dc:rights: Copyright 2026 Sina K. Heshmati. All rights reserved.

refnamediv.refpurpose: Governed SMTP send and IMAP4 search, fetch, forward, and git snapshot for the Singine platform.

refsect1.title: Description
refsect1.para: singine mail is the MAIL opcode of the Singine governed lambda engine. It provides five subcommands for interacting with SMTP and IMAP4rev1 mail servers:

listitem.para: search — find messages by keyword matched against sender, subject, and body fields.
fetch — retrieve one or more messages by IMAP UID and return them as compact XML envelopes (urn:singine:mail namespace).
send — send a plain-text email via SMTP (ESMTP AUTH LOGIN). Supports reply and forward workflows.
fwd — forward a message by IMAP UID to one or more recipients. The subject is prefixed with Fwd:.
snap — snapshot the mailbox into git-versioned .eml.xml files under mail/<folder>/<uid>.eml.xml. Generates a commit message with URN-tagged UIDs and an ISO timestamp.

refsect1.para: All subcommands follow the singine governed lambda pattern: they return zero-arg thunks wrapping the operation. Every network operation has a 30-second timeout. Dry-run mode is supported for offline testing.
The underlying implementation (MailClient.java) uses raw TCP sockets and the JDK 11+ standard library only — no javax.mail dependency is required.

refsect1.title: XML Envelope Format
refsect1.para: Fetched messages are returned as a compact XML envelope:
refsect1.programlisting: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <mail-batch xmlns="urn:singine:mail" count="2"> <mail uid="1001" folder="INBOX"> <from>sender@example.com</from> <to>me@example.com</to> <subject>Invoice #42</subject> <date>Mon, 23 Feb 2026 12:00:00 +0000</date> <body-preview>First 256 chars of body…</body-preview> </mail> <mail uid="1002" folder="INBOX"> … </mail> </mail-batch>
refsect1.para: Each <mail> element carries exactly five fields — the minimum payload for efficient event-driven processing. The full body is not fetched by default. Git-snap files are stored as mail/INBOX/1001.eml.xml.

listitem.para: IMAP server hostname. Default: localhost.
IMAP server port. Default: 993.
Use TLS for IMAP. Default: true.
SMTP server hostname. Default: localhost.
SMTP server port. Default: 587.
Use STARTTLS for SMTP submission. Default: false.
IMAP/SMTP username.
IMAP/SMTP password.
IMAP folder to search or fetch from. Default: INBOX.
Keyword to search for in sender, subject, or body.
Maximum results to return. Default: 20 (search), 10 (snap).
Base directory for git-snap output files. Default: mail.
Sender address for send and fwd. Defaults to --user.
Recipient address for send and fwd.
Message subject for send.
Plain-text message body for send.
Return synthetic results without connecting to any server. For testing.

refsect2.title: Search for invoices in INBOX
refsect2.para: Returns up to 5 IMAP UIDs matching invoice.

refsect2.title: Fetch messages by UID as XML
refsect2.para: Prints the mail-batch XML envelope to stdout.

refsect2.title: Send an email
refsect2.screen: singine mail send \ --to recipient@example.com \ --subject "Singine report" \ --body "Please find the attached data governance report."

refsect2.title: Forward a message to another address
refsect2.para: Fetches message UID 1001 from INBOX, prepends Fwd: to the subject, and sends to manager@example.com.

refsect2.title: Git snapshot of mailbox
refsect2.para: Searches for invoice, fetches matching messages, writes each as mail/INBOX/<uid>.eml.xml, and prints a ready-to-use git commit message:
refsect2.screen:
mail: snapshot 3 messages from INBOX at 2026-02-23T12:00:00Z
[urn:singine:mail:INBOX:1001] [urn:singine:mail:INBOX:1002] [urn:singine:mail:INBOX:1003]

refsect2.title: Dry-run test (offline)
refsect2.para: Returns synthetic UIDs without connecting to any server.

refsect2.title: Docker: start local mail server, then search
refsect2.screen:
# Start Postfix + Dovecot via Ant ant mail-docker-up
# Wait for health check to pass, then search singine mail search invoice \ --imap-host localhost --imap-port 1143 --imap-tls false \ --user singine --pass singinepass

refsect2.title: Ant: compile + test
refsect2.screen: cd singine/core ant all # clean → compile → full test suite ant test-mail # only tc-mail01..tc-mail05

listitem.para: Domain name for the Docker mail server. Default: localhost.
Username for the Docker mail server. Default: singine.
Password for the Docker mail server. Default: singinepass.
Raw-socket SMTP + IMAP4rev1 implementation. JDK 11+ stdlib only.
Governed Clojure namespace — all five subcommands as lam/govern thunks.
Docker image: Postfix + Dovecot for local dev.
Compose file: ports 1025 (SMTP), 1587 (Submission), 1143 (IMAP), 1993 (IMAPS).
Apache Ant build: ant all, ant test-mail, ant mail-docker-up.
Git-versioned mail snapshots produced by singine mail snap.

refsect1.title: See Also
refsect1.para: singine1, singine-idpr1, singine-gitp1, RFC 5321 (SMTP), RFC 3501 (IMAP4rev1), urn:singine:doc:mail:man:1

refsect1.title: Author
refsect1.para: Sina K. Heshmati <singine@localhost>. Singine platform — https://github.com/sindoc/singine.

refsect1.title: Copyright
refsect1.para: Copyright © 2026 Sina K. Heshmati. All rights reserved. URN: urn:singine:doc:mail:man:1.
